vocab.example: The watch serves as a tangible reminder of my parents' unwavering support throughout my academic journey.
In my culture, gifting a timepiece is a customary practice to signal a young person's entry into adulthood.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng di sản (bền vững để truyền lại)
vocab.example: I was overwhelmed when I received an heirloom-quality watch that had been in our family for three generations.

vocab.meaning: giá trị tình cảm vô cùng lớn
vocab.example: Even though it is an older model, the watch holds immense sentimental value because it was a parting gift from a dear friend.

vocab.meaning: đánh dấu một dịp đặc biệt
vocab.example: My siblings pooled their money to buy me a designer watch to mark the occasion of my first major job promotion.
I vividly remember the excitement I felt as I unboxed the gift and saw the polished chrome finish glinting in the light.

vocab.meaning: tôn thêm/hợp với phong cách cá nhân
vocab.example: The watch was a perfect choice because it beautifully complements my preference for minimalist and clean aesthetics.
I have been the lucky recipient of a luxury watch from a generous benefactor within my extended family.

vocab.meaning: sự cộng hưởng/ý nghĩa cảm xúc sâu sắc
vocab.example: A watch given as a graduation present often carries a profound emotional resonance that lasts a lifetime.

vocab.meaning: được thèm muốn/ao ước rất nhiều
vocab.example: Receiving a highly coveted limited-edition watch as a birthday surprise was beyond my wildest dreams.
